LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF DDM GAME STUDIO REPRESENTATION LLC'S APPLICATION FOR A RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER AND WRIT OF ATTACHMENT AGAINST DEFENDANT HIBERNUM CREATIONS IS CONTINUED TO APRIL 18, 2017, AT 9:30 A.M., IN DEPT. 302, TO GIVE HIBERNUM AN OPPORTUNITY TO RESPOND TO THE AFFIDAVIT OF JOSEPH MINTON SUBMITTED WITH THE REPLY PAPERS. THE COURT EXERCISES ITS DISCRETION TO CONSIDER THE AFFIDAVIT OF JOSEPH MINTON SUBMITTED WITH THE REPLY PAPERS AND THEREFORE GIVES HIBERNUM UNTIL APRIL 12, 2017 TO FILE A RESPONSE TO THAT AFFIDAVIT. (JAY V. MAHAFFEY (2013) 218 CAL. APP. 4TH 1522, 1537-38 (CONSIDERATION OF EVIDENCE SUBMITTED WITH REPLY PAPERS SHOULD ONLY BE ALLOWED IN AN EXCEPTIONAL CASE AND, WHEN DONE, "THE OTHER PARTY SHOULD BE GIVEN AN OPPORTUNITY TO RESPOND.")) NO FURTHER FILINGS ON THIS APPLICATION ARE PERMITTED. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: LAURA A. REDING, CSR 	711 =302/HK

MINI MINUTES:

RULING - A R G U E D; The court vacated its tentative ruling and ruled as follows: Plaintiff DDM Game Studio Representation LLC's application for a right to attach order and writ of attachment is Granted. APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER
Off Calendar Apr-10-2017 Continued To Apr-18-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
Plaintiff DDM Game Studio Representation LLC's application for a right to attach order and writ of attachment against defendant Hibernum Creations is continued to April 18, 2017 to give Hibernum an opportunity to respond to the affidavit of Joseph Minton submitted with the reply papers. The court exercises its discretion to consider the affidavit of Joseph Minton submitted with the reply papers and therefore gives Hibernum until April 12, 2017 to file a response to that affidavit. (Jay v. Mahaffey (2013) 218 Cal. App. 4th 1522, 1537-38 (consideration of evidence submitted with reply papers should only be allowed in an exceptional case and, when done, "the other party should be given an opportunity to respond.")) No further filings on this application are permitted. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Laura A. Reding, CSR 711 =302/hk
